scripts.dev: npm run sync-ip && concurrently --kill-others --names "BACKEND,ADMIN,AI,MOBILE" --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta,cyan" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:ai-service"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix admin-dashboard install && cd mobile && flutter pub get && cd ../ai_service && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
